response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior generalist with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node expertise, and recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-relevant experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only light cloud-platform exposure (AWS CDK in one role). He falls well short of the core requirements for a staff-level GenAI forward-deployed role despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly matching listed key technologies
Deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience across many companies, including high-throughput low-latency systems
Proven mentorship and customer-facing communication skills via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/optimization experience
Limited demonstrated depth on major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK usage in a single role

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python evidence
